prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(open_investigation_for_item gl_account_4000)
(open_investigation_for_item subledger_account_4000)
(open_investigation_for_item investigation_case_001)
(open_investigation_for_item investigation_case_002)
(assign_analyst_to_investigation gl_account_4000 analyst_001)
(assign_analyst_to_investigation subledger_account_4000 analyst_001)
(assign_analyst_to_investigation investigation_case_001 analyst_002)
(assign_analyst_to_investigation investigation_case_002 analyst_003)

(attach_support_document_to_investigation subledger_account_4000 support_document_bank_statement_jan)

(attach_support_document_to_investigation investigation_case_002 support_document_bank_statement_jan)

(complete_triage_for_item investigation_case_002 support_document_bank_statement_jan)

(assign_reviewer_to_investigation subledger_account_4000 reviewer_senior_1)
(assign_reviewer_to_investigation investigation_case_001 reviewer_senior_1)
(assign_reviewer_to_investigation investigation_case_002 reviewer_senior_1)
(validate_reconciliation_line_gl_evidence gl_account_4000 reconciliation_line_gl_100 support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(validate_statement_line_with_support subledger_account_4000 statement_line_counterparty_1 support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(review_and_validate_gl_account_reconciliation gl_account_4000 reconciliation_line_gl_100 reviewer_senior_1)
(review_and_validate_subledger_account_reconciliation subledger_account_4000 statement_line_counterparty_1 reviewer_senior_1)
(assemble_reconciliation_bundle_basic gl_account_4000 subledger_account_4000 reconciliation_line_gl_100 statement_line_counterparty_1 reconciliation_bundle_001)
(confirm_bundle_gl_support_integration reconciliation_bundle_001 gl_account_4000 support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(generate_supporting_workpaper_from_template investigation_case_001 workpaper_template_standard_1 reconciliation_bundle_001)
(generate_supporting_workpaper_from_template investigation_case_002 workpaper_template_standard_2 reconciliation_bundle_001)
(attach_approval_document_to_case investigation_case_001 approval_document_manager_signoff)
(attach_approval_document_to_case investigation_case_002 approval_document_manager_signoff)
(attach_policy_document_to_case investigation_case_001 accounting_policy_inventory)
(attach_policy_document_to_case investigation_case_002 accounting_policy_revenue)
(finalize_supporting_workpaper_generation investigation_case_001 workpaper_template_standard_1 reconciliation_bundle_001 support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(finalize_supporting_workpaper_generation investigation_case_002 workpaper_template_standard_2 reconciliation_bundle_001 support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(apply_template_and_record_policy_review investigation_case_001 workpaper_template_standard_1 reconciliation_bundle_001 support_document_bank_statement_jan accounting_policy_inventory)
(apply_template_and_record_policy_review investigation_case_002 workpaper_template_standard_2 reconciliation_bundle_001 support_document_bank_statement_jan accounting_policy_revenue)
(submit_case_for_senior_review investigation_case_001 approval_document_manager_signoff reviewer_senior_1 workpaper_template_standard_1 reconciliation_bundle_001)
(submit_case_for_senior_review investigation_case_002 approval_document_manager_signoff reviewer_senior_1 workpaper_template_standard_2 reconciliation_bundle_001)
(attach_audit_attachment_to_case investigation_case_001 audit_attachment_evidence_1)
(attach_audit_attachment_to_case investigation_case_002 audit_attachment_evidence_1)
(complete_senior_review_and_mark_checklist_full investigation_case_001 audit_attachment_evidence_1 workpaper_template_standard_1 reconciliation_bundle_001)
(complete_senior_review_and_mark_checklist_full investigation_case_002 audit_attachment_evidence_1 workpaper_template_standard_2 reconciliation_bundle_001)
(attach_control_checklist_to_case investigation_case_001 control_checklist_month_end)
(attach_control_checklist_to_case investigation_case_002 control_checklist_recon)
(finalize_case_validation investigation_case_001 gl_account_4000 subledger_account_4000 support_document_bank_statement_jan control_checklist_month_end)
(finalize_case_validation investigation_case_002 gl_account_4000 subledger_account_4000 support_document_bank_statement_jan control_checklist_recon)
(record_case_final_signoff investigation_case_001)
(record_case_final_signoff investigation_case_002)
(post_adjustment_for_balance_sheet_item gl_account_4000 root_cause_timing support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(post_adjustment_for_balance_sheet_item subledger_account_4000 root_cause_timing support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(post_adjustment_for_balance_sheet_item investigation_case_001 root_cause_timing support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(post_adjustment_for_balance_sheet_item investigation_case_002 root_cause_timing support_document_bank_statement_jan)
(apply_adjustment_to_gl_account_and_release_analyst gl_account_4000 analyst_001 root_cause_timing)
(apply_adjustment_to_subledger_and_release_analyst subledger_account_4000 analyst_001 root_cause_timing)
(apply_adjustment_to_case_and_release_analyst investigation_case_001 analyst_002 root_cause_timing)
(apply_adjustment_to_case_and_release_analyst investigation_case_002 analyst_003 root_cause_timing)
```
message.reasoning:
Let me analyze this planning problem carefully.

The goal is to have:
- (item_closed gl_account_4000)
- (item_closed subledger_account_4000)
- (item_closed investigation_case_001)
- (item_closed investigation_case_002)

Looking at the domain, I can see that items can be closed through different actions:
1. apply_adjustment_to_gl_account_and_release_analyst - closes a gl_account
2. apply_adjustment_to_subledger_and_release_analyst - closes a subledger_account
3. apply_adjustment_to_case_and_release_analyst - closes an investigation_case

Each of these requires:
- (adjustment_posted ?item)
- (assigned_to_analyst ?item ?analyst)
- (item_linked_root_cause ?item ?root_cause_code)

And (adjustment_posted ?item) requires:
- (adjustment_approved ?item)
- (attached_support_document ?item ?support_document)
- (root_cause_code_available ?root_cause_code)

And (adjustment_approved ?item) can be achieved through various paths, but for cases it seems to require senior_review_completed and case_validated, then record_case_final_signoff.

Let me trace through the initial state:
- analyst_001, analyst_002, analyst_003 are available
- support_document_bank_statement_jan is available
- reviewer_senior_1 is available
- workpaper_initial_analysis is available
- gl_account_4000 is linked to reconciliation_line_gl_100
- subledger_account_4000 is linked to statement_line_counterparty_1
- reconciliation_bundle_001 is available
- workpaper_template_standard_1 and workpaper_template_standard_2 are available
- case_links_gl_account investigation_case_001 gl_account_4000
- case_links_gl_account investigation_case_002 gl_account_4000


- case_links_subledger_account investigation_case_001 subledger_account_4000
- case_links_subledger_account investigation_case_002 subledger_account_4000
- case_links_reconciliation_bundle investigation_case_001 reconciliation_bundle_001
- case_links_reconciliation_bundle investigation_case_002 reconciliation_bundle_001
- case_links_supporting_template investigation_case_001 workpaper_template_standard_1
- case_links_supporting_template investigation_case_002 workpaper_template_standard_2
- policy_doc_available accounting_policy_inventory
- policy_doc_available accounting_policy_revenue
- control_checklist_available control_checklist_month_end
- control_checklist_available control_checklist_recon
- root_cause_code_available root_cause_timing
- approval_document_available approval_document_manager_signoff
- audit_note_available audit_note_query_1
- case_linked_audit_note investigation_case_001 audit_note_query_1
- case_linked_audit_note investigation_case_002 audit_note_query_2
- audit_attachment_available audit_attachment_evidence_1

The investigation cases need to be opened first. I need to open investigations for gl_account_4000 and subledger_account_4000, then assign analysts to each. Once analysts are assigned, I can attach support documents and begin the reconciliation process for both the GL and subledger accounts.

For the cases, I need to assign reviewers after triage is complete, then validate the reconciliation lines and accounts. The reconciliation bundle needs to be assembled with validated GL and subledger components. From there, I can generate supporting workpapers from templates, attach policy documents, and submit each case for senior review before completing the final sign-off and posting adjustments.

However, I'm noticing a constraint issue: there's only one support document available initially, but multiple items require one. The release_support_document action might allow me to reuse it, though I need to verify the preconditions are satisfied. Additionally, I have only one workpaper and one reviewer, which could create bottlenecks depending on how the workflow sequences these dependencies.

Looking at the case-specific predicates, I notice that investigation_case_001 and investigation_case_002 are already linked to audit notes through case_linked_audit_note, but I don't see corresponding item_triaged predicates for either case. This means I need to establish those base conditions first before proceeding with the reconciliation workflow.

The challenge is that each case requires its own support document, yet only one support document exists in the initial state. I can work around this by attaching the document to one case, triaging it, then releasing it to attach to the other case. However, I also need to account for the fact that items like gl_account_4000 and subledger_account_4000 function as balance_sheet_items themselves, so I need to determine whether the investigation should be opened at the case level or at the item level.

Looking at the predicates more carefully, investigation_case_001 and investigation_case_002 are case_subtype_groups (which are balance_sheet_items), while gl_account_4000 and subledger_account_4000 are account_subtype_groups (also balance_sheet_items). This means I need to open investigations for both the cases and the individual GL/subl edger accounts. The case_links_* predicates already establish relationships between the cases and their corresponding accounts, so I can use those connections to satisfy the requirements for each investigation.

The workflow requires opening investigations on the accounts first, then assigning analysts, attaching support documents, and completing triage before moving to the case-level actions. Since each account needs its own investigation opened, I'll need to handle gl_account_4000 and subledger_account_4000 separately, then proceed through the same steps for each case.

For the first account, I open the investigation, assign analyst_001, attach the support document, and complete triage. The second account follows the same sequence with the same analyst and support document, reusing the released document after each step.

Once both accounts are triaged, I can assign reviewer_senior_1 to validate the reconciliation lines and validate both the GL and subledger accounts. With the accounts validated, I assemble reconciliation_bundle_001 to link everything together, then confirm the bundle's GL support integration.

Now I need to handle the cases. For investigation_case_001, I open an investigation and assign analyst_002 to it. The same support document gets attached to this case as well.

After completing triage for the case, I assign the senior reviewer and generate a supporting workpaper from the standard template. I also need to attach the approval document and policy document to the case, then finalize the workpaper generation.

Once the workpapers are ready, I submit the case for senior review and complete that review with the audit attachment. After the senior review finishes, I attach the control checklist and validate the case. Finally, I record the final sign-off and post the adjustment with the root cause identified.

For the second case, I follow the same workflow: open the investigation, assign an analyst, attach the support document, complete triage, assign the senior reviewer, generate the supporting workpaper from the second template, attach the approval and policy documents, finalize the workpaper generation, submit for senior review, complete the review with the audit attachment, attach the control checklist, validate the case, and record the final sign-off with the adjustment posted.

Now I need to apply the adjustments to the GL account and subledger account, releasing the analyst in each case. Let me verify the preconditions for each step—for instance, open_investigation_for_item requires that the investigation hasn't been opened yet and the item isn't closed, both of which should be satisfied in the initial state. I need to verify the predicate requirements for each action. The validate_reconciliation_line_gl_evidence action needs item_triaged on the gl_account, attached_support_document, and gl_account_linked_reconciliation_line to all be true. Similarly, review_and_validate_gl_account_reconciliation requires item_triaged on the gl_account, assigned_reviewer, gl_account_linked_reconciliation_line, and recon_line_gl_validated. The assemble_reconciliation_bundle_basic action has the most complex set of preconditions, requiring gl_account_ready, subledger_account_ready, the appropriate linkages between accounts and reconciliation lines, validation flags on both lines, and the reconciliation bundle itself to be available.

For the case-level actions, generate_supporting_workpaper_from_template needs item_triaged on the investigation_case, case_links_reconciliation_bundle, case_links_supporting_template, workpaper_template_available, reconciliation_bundle_assembled, and bundle_gl_evidence_confirmed all to be true. The apply_template_and_record_policy_review action requires item_triaged on the case, the supporting template to be linked and consumed, the bundle to be attached, bundle_gl_validated to be true, and policy documents to be attached to the case.

submit_case_for_senior_review needs case_workpapers_generated, case_linked_approval_document, assigned_reviewer, case_links_supporting_template, template_linked_to_bundle, and the negation of bundle_statement_validated. Senior review completion requires case_ready_for_senior_review, case_linked_audit_attachment, case_links_supporting_template, template_linked_to_bundle, and both bundle_gl_validated and bundle_statement_validated to be false. The finalize_case_validation action requires senior_review_completed, control_checklist_applied, case_linked_control_checklist, case_links_gl_account, case_links_subledger_account, gl_account_validated, subledger_account_validated, and attached_support_document, with case_validated initially false.

record_case_final_signoff requires senior_review_completed, case_validated, and case_signoff_recorded to be false. post_adjustment_for_balance_sheet_item requires adjustment_approved, attached_support_document, root_cause_code_available, and adjustment_posted to be false. apply_adjustment_to_gl_account_and_release_analyst requires adjustment_posted on the gl_account, assigned_to_analyst, item_linked_root_cause, and item_closed to be false. The plan needs to ensure all preconditions are satisfied before each action executes, particularly managing the support_document through release and reattach operations.

I need to verify the action parameters match the domain definitions. open_investigation_for_item takes a balance_sheet_item, assign_analyst_to_investigation takes a balance_sheet_item and analyst, attach_support_document_to_investigation takes a balance_sheet_item and support_document, and complete_triage_for_item takes a balance_sheet_item and support_document. The domain uses balance_sheet_item as the type, and investigation_case, gl_account, and subledger_account are all subtypes of balance_sheet_item, so the parameter typing should work correctly.

Now I'll construct the full sequence: opening investigations for both the GL and subledger accounts, assigning analysts, attaching the bank statement, completing triage, then repeating for the investigation cases before moving through validation and senior review steps.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
